name: St Govan's Chapel to Green Bridge of Wales
highlights: Most dramatic limestone coastline in Britain — when MoD range is open.
points_of_interest: St Govan's Chapel (medieval hermit's cell in cliff); Green Bridge of Wales arch
viewpoints: Huntsman's Leap; Elegug Stacks; seabird colonies
picnic_spots: Near St Govan's; by Elegug Stacks
food_drink_nearby: St Govan's Inn Bosherston; Pembroke pubs
hazards_notes: MoD firing range — check access days; cliff edges; no barriers
